scripts.bootstrap: npm install --include=dev --loglevel=error && npm run ensure:electron && npm --prefix ../web install --include=dev --loglevel=error
scripts.build:api:win: cargo xwin build --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p data-cos-api --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc --release && cp ../rust/target/aarch64-pc-windows-msvc/release/data-cos-api.exe ../rust/target/release/data-cos-api.exe
scripts.build:api:win:x64: cargo xwin build --manifest-path ../rust/Cargo.toml -p data-cos-api --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc --release && cp ../rust/target/x86_64-pc-windows-msvc/release/data-cos-api.exe ../rust/target/release/data-cos-api.exe
scripts.dist: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:api && npx electron-builder@26.0.12
scripts.dist:mac: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:api && npx electron-builder@26.0.12 --mac
scripts.dist:win: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:api:win && npx electron-builder@26.0.12 --win --arm64 && mv -f "dist/DataCosSuite Setup 0.1.0.exe" "dist/DataCosSuite Setup 0.1.0 arm64.exe" && mv -f "dist/DataCosSuite Setup 0.1.0.exe.blockmap" "dist/DataCosSuite Setup 0.1.0 arm64.exe.blockmap"
scripts.dist:win:x64: npm run build:renderer && npm run build:api:win:x64 && npx electron-builder@26.0.12 --win --x64 && mv -f "dist/DataCosSuite Setup 0.1.0.exe" "dist/DataCosSuite Setup 0.1.0 x64.exe" && mv -f "dist/DataCosSuite Setup 0.1.0.exe.blockmap" "dist/DataCosSuite Setup 0.1.0 x64.exe.blockmap" && mv -f "dist/DataCosSuite-0.1.0-win.zip" "dist/DataCosSuite-0.1.0-x64-win.zip"
